commit_scope: Add a physical local speech teacher corpus floor so multiple macOS TTS/local Whisper STT receipts become one Form-native training window.

phase_gate.reason: The physical local speech corpus is proven; native macOS/Android audio API corpus emission and native STT/TTS heldout wins remain next gaps.

evidence_refs: scripts/speech_teacher_corpus_receipt.sh -> live no-Python corpus witness over the single-receipt carrier
.cache/speech-teacher-corpus/20260615T164203Z/speech-teacher-corpus-receipt.json -> live corpus with samples=4, min_overlap=100, total_duration_ms=7763
form/form-stdlib/speech-model-learning.fk -> corpus row, aggregate validity gate, corpus samples, score card, and teacher-retirement gate
docs/coherence-substrate/speech-teacher-receipt.form -> body-readable corpus floor, north star, not-claimed, and next gaps

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Cells and recipes can now consume several physical local TTS/STT teacher receipts as one explicit Form-native speech corpus training window while refusing too-small or invalid corpora.
public_endpoints: not-applicable: local hardware/model carrier proof only
test_flows: Generate four macOS TTS audio samples through the single speech teacher receipt witness.
Lower each sample to 16 kHz mono PCM and transcribe with local whisper-cli.
Aggregate sample receipts into one corpus receipt with count, pass count, minimum overlap, total bytes, total samples, total duration, and corpus hash.
Validate the corpus shape four-way in Form and lower each receipt into native training samples.
Prove a weak native candidate cannot retire teacher authority and a perfect heldout native candidate can.

floor_update.previous_observed_floor: Speech learning had one live no-Python TTS/STT receipt accepted as native training data.
floor_update.current_observed_floor: Four local Mac TTS/STT receipts form one corpus window with min overlap 100, total_wav_bytes=264784, total_samples=124200, total_duration_ms=7763, and a four-way Form corpus proof.
not_claimed: Android native audio API corpus receipt
teacher authority retired by the current corpus alone
